translations.homepage.ai.alt: Abstract AI analysis with score lines and prediction panels
translations.homepage.ai.body: Our AI layer prioritizes relevant spending patterns, categorizes dynamically, and provides context before users even have to search. Result: less noise, better decisions.
translations.homepage.ai.title: Adaptive Finance Intelligence
translations.homepage.aws.alt: AWS cloud infrastructure with services, data layer, and monitoring
translations.homepage.aws.body: The backend stack is built cloud-first: reproducible deployments, stable operations, and infrastructure designed for high availability.
translations.homepage.aws.title: Cloud Operations with Production Discipline
translations.homepage.blockchain.alt: Chain structure with verified financial blocks and signature points
translations.homepage.blockchain.body: Critical financial events can be logged in an auditable way to enforce immutability, traceability, and trust in sensitive workflows.
translations.homepage.blockchain.title: Verifiable Financial Ledger Layer
translations.homepage.design.body: These subpoints show how reduced interfaces keep the focus on decisions instead of visual noise.
translations.homepage.design.expenses.alt: Reduced expense view with a clear focus on structure
translations.homepage.design.expenses.body: The expense view stays clean and guides the eye through categories and totals with a clear hierarchy.
translations.homepage.design.expenses.title: Calm Expense Structure
translations.homepage.design.groupchat.alt: Lean group chat with a reduced interface
translations.homepage.design.groupchat.body: The group chat is intentionally simple so agreements stay quick to understand and do not get lost in the UI.
translations.homepage.design.groupchat.title: Communication Without Clutter
translations.homepage.design.income.alt: Minimalist income overview in the dashboard
translations.homepage.design.income.body: Important metrics are immediately readable because only relevant information is in the foreground.
translations.homepage.design.income.title: Clear Income Surfaces
translations.homepage.design.stock1.alt: Minimalist stock panel focused on core values
translations.homepage.design.stock1.body: Charts and values are arranged so trends can be understood instantly, even during quick checks.
translations.homepage.design.stock1.title: Focus in the Stocks Area
translations.homepage.design.stock2.alt: Reduced market view with clear contrast and data points
translations.homepage.design.stock2.body: Contrast, spacing, and typography support fast decisions and keep the overall flow consistent.
translations.homepage.design.stock2.title: Less Friction, More Speed
translations.homepage.design.title: Why the minimalist design works so well
translations.homepage.hero.body: FinanzApp combines AI assist, cloud-native scaling, and resilient security in one platform built for both personal and collaborative finance.
translations.homepage.hero.title: Finance management that thinks like an enterprise system, but delivers at startup speed.
translations.homepage.income_expenses.aria: Demo of tracking income and expenses in FinanzApp
translations.homepage.income_expenses.body: This video shows how entries are captured quickly and reflected instantly in your financial overview, keeping day-to-day tracking clear and lightweight.
translations.homepage.income_expenses.title: Income and expenses in one flow
translations.homepage.income_expenses.unsupported: Your browser does not support this video format.
translations.homepage.loadbalanced.alt: Load balancer routing multiple data streams across service nodes
translations.homepage.loadbalanced.body: Incoming traffic is distributed intelligently to keep response times stable and operate critical service components robustly under peak conditions.
translations.homepage.loadbalanced.title: Traffic-Aware Service Orchestration
translations.homepage.quantum.alt: Quantum-inspired network structure with nodes and interference patterns
translations.homepage.quantum.body: The architecture is modularly prepared to integrate future quantum optimization into analytics and forecasting paths without rebuilding core processes.
translations.homepage.quantum.title: Quantum-Ready Core Design
translations.homepage.saas.alt: SaaS delivery with multiple releases, pipelines, and user groups
translations.homepage.saas.body: Release cycles, security updates, and product improvements run continuously so the platform can scale with market demands without downtime.
translations.homepage.saas.title: Continuous Value Delivery
translations.homepage.scalable.alt: Scaling cluster topology with a growing service grid
translations.homepage.scalable.body: Services are scaled horizontally and deployed with clear separation. This keeps the platform extensible, maintainable, and open to new modules under load.
translations.homepage.scalable.title: Horizontal Growth Without Friction
translations.homepage.serverless.alt: Serverless architecture with event flows and distributed functions
translations.homepage.serverless.body: Event-based services react to traffic spikes in real time and decouple demand from static infrastructure. The platform stays performant even as user numbers surge.
translations.homepage.serverless.title: Instant Elastic Runtime
translations.homepage.video.aria: Demo of fast registration in FinanzApp
translations.homepage.video.body: One scroll, one short look, immediate clarity: this flow is built for speed and stays in focus while scrolling.
translations.homepage.video.title: Fast registration in seconds
translations.homepage.video.unsupported: Your browser does not support this video format.
